name: Longino & Cardenal S.p.A.
summary: Longino & Cardenal S.p.A. supplies catering services to hotels and restaurants in Italy and internationally. It offers seafood products; plancton Marino; meats and eggs; hams and salamis; cheeses and other dairy products; flowers, sprouts, and aromatic herbs; truffles and mushrooms; breads, pastas, rice, and pulses; salts, spices, and condiments; pastry products; and ethnic products and accessories, as well as champagnes and vodkas. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Pogliano Milanese, Italy.
